data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the persona scenario of supporting identity verification requirements. However, the evidence provided does not include specific details or results from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected outcome was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence to support the validation of the scenario leads to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of the scenario being simulated or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Provide simulation results for persona scenario
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Include detailed results from the simulation of the persona scenario to confirm expected outcomes.
